title: Count the vowels
prompt: Write count_vowels(s) that returns how many vowels (a, e, i, o, u, case-insensitive) are in the string s.

details.restate: Count how many vowels — a, e, i, o, u — appear in the text, treating capitals the same as lowercase. Give back the count.

io.because: the two capital I's count — case doesn't matter

terms.meaning: capital and lowercase letters are treated as the same letter
